title: Erythroxylum gonoclados

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as relief from pain, inflammation, and anxiety, as well as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Erythroxylum gonoclados include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic properties.
